proposal_text:
Title: Spirit of the Score
Concept: Experience the ultimate sport of mind over matter.
Website Product Description: Step into a revolutionary sports game where physical skill takes a backseat to mental prowess. In *Spirit of the Score*, your true opponent isn't across the field, but within your own mind. This unique experience redefines competition, focusing entirely on your concentration, strategic thinking, and emotional resilience.

You'll face mysterious 'curses' that appear during gameplay, challenging your focus through exciting quick-time events and clever puzzles. These aren't random obstacles; they represent your mental blocks and personal struggles, testing your perception and forcing you to make split-second decisions. Every successful challenge strengthens your resolve, while faltering might impact your psychological score. Master your inner game, overcome these mental hurdles, and strategically employ your will and emotions to outsmart both yourself and any external competition. *Spirit of the Score* is a deep dive into the essence of competition, proving that the greatest victory is always self-mastery.

Title: Chronos Weavers: Echoes of Tomorrow
Concept: Weave the future. Win the past.
Website Product Description: In a world teetering on the brink, the war isn't fought with bullets and bombs, but with threads of time itself. You are a Chronos Weaver, leading an elite military unit tasked not with conquering territory, but with manipulating the very timeline. Each decision you make sends ripples backward and forward, altering history to secure a future free from collapse. Your battles unfold across shifting realities, where yesterday’s defeat can become tomorrow’s victory with a strategic temporal maneuver. Recruit specialists who can "echo" future events into the past, or "unravel" catastrophic decisions made centuries ago. Every choice creates a new branch of existence, and you must master the art of temporal strategy to protect humanity's last hope. This is a game where your intuition and foresight are your deadliest weapons, and the true enemy is a timeline spiraling into chaos.
